title: Elemental Shields
description: Strengthening existing armour with additional regenerable shields
body:
Strengthening existing armour with additional regenerable shields

 

Elemental Shields are some rare enchantments that can provide you special perks with regenerable absorption based on your chest plate armour value (defence pts x 3).

 

How does it work:

By putting special enchantments on your chestplate, you can get different types of element shield.

One element per chestplate.

 

Some element will regenerate naturally, however you can restore the shields manually by drinking:

Water - 3.0 pts

Any kinds of potion - 12.0 pts

Detailed Enchantments Description
